name: Tywin Lannister
description:
Name

Tywin Lannister

Titles / Occupation

  • Lord of Casterly Rock

  • Hand of the King

  • Warden of the West

  • Patriarch of House Lannister

Residence

  • Primary: The Red Keep, King’s Landing

  • Secondary: Casterly Rock

Scenes

  1. Ash and Stone → Arrival / first meeting

  2. Barefoot Defiance → Pre-dinner intimacy

  3. Vows Beneath Dragonfire → Wedding

  4. No Time Wasted → Pregnancy reveal & court fallout
